svg.title: SVG Image created as project schematic.svg date 2026-05-09T20:55:51

g.desc: I added the 100 nF capacitor between 3.3V and GND for decoupling.
It helps stabilize the power supply voltage and reduce electrical noise around the microcontroller.
Even though the Nucleo board already has capacitors built in, I included it in the schematic.
I added the PWR_FLAG symbols to indicate that the 3.3V and GND lines are
powered externally by the Nucleo board.
This helps KiCad pass the ERC checks and removes warnings about unpowered
I added the "X" no-connect symbols on unused pins to indicate that those pins were intentionally left unconnected.
This helps keep the schematic clear and removes ERC warnings in KiCad about floating or unconnected pins.
